untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires multi-bar structural analysis: (1) Detection of TWO distinct bottom lows with 43-day separation and <1% difference cannot be expressed as single-bar indicator conditions; (2) 'No dips on either side' requirement needs multi-bar lookback pattern logic beyond indicator scope; (3) Relative volume comparison between two specific swing points requires bar-by-bar pattern matching, not available in standard indicators. Best approximation provided using price position, volume ratio, and breakout confirmation.
